translation: 被盗走的奥术水晶
context: { "reference name": "Blockade3", "display name": "Stolen Arcane Crystals", "description": "A thief known as the \"Mistweaving Phantom\" stole a dangerous shipment of high-capacity arcane crystals attuned to evocation magic. original: A thief known as the "Mistweaving Phantom" stole a dangerous shipment of high-capacity arcane crystals attuned to evocation magic. In the wrong hands, these crystals could produce an explosion capable of destroying a city block. This theft occurred the morning of Justin's death on an imperial ship owned by Crown Prince Aster. The Kingsguard have set up a blockade and prevented anyone from traveling in and out of Aurinax. They seem to be making note of everyone in the city.
translation: 一个被称为“织雾魅影”的盗窃团伙偷走了一件货物，其内容为已充满塑能术魔力的高容量奥术水晶。如果保管不当，这些水晶将造成威力足以摧毁一整个街区的大爆炸。这场盗窃发生在贾斯汀·维耶死亡的那个上午，地点为王储阿斯特殿下所有的货船。国王卫队设立了封锁，禁止任何人进出欧奥耐克斯。看起来他们在对城中的所有人进行记录。

original: There is a thief who calls themselves the "Mistweaving Phantom". They've been expertly robbing several merchant ships that were resting at Aurinax Harbor. No one ever spots them, and they never leave any evidence behind—hence the name.
translation: 有一个自称为“织雾魅影”的盗窃团伙。他们一直在对停靠在欧奥耐克斯港的货船实施精妙的抢劫。从未有人发现他们的踪迹，他们也从不留下任何证据——因此得名“织雾魅影”。

original: There is a thief who calls themselves the "Mistweaving Phantom". They've been expertly robbing several merchant ships that were resting at Aurinax Harbor. They've also been breaking into the magically secured offices of the workers' unions and stealing administrative documents. No one ever spots them, and they never leave any evidence behind—hence the name.
translation: 有一个自称为“织雾魅影”的盗窃团伙。他们一直在对停靠在欧奥耐克斯港的货船实施精妙的抢劫。他们也曾闯入工会那些被法术保护的办公室，偷窃其行政文件。从未有人发现他们的踪迹，他们也从不留下任何证据——因此得名“织雾魅影”。

original: There is a thief who calls themselves the "Mistweaving Phantom". They've been expertly robbing several merchant ships that were resting at Aurinax Harbor. They've also been breaking into the magically secured offices of the workers' unions and stealing administrative documents. Lastly, they broke into Stefanic Dracogen's office near the catwalk where Justin Waye fell from. They didn't steal the gold inside the safe, but they took the business documents inside. No one ever spots them, and they never leave any evidence behind—hence the name.
translation: 有一个自称为“织雾魅影”的盗窃团伙。他们一直在对停靠在欧奥耐克斯港的货船实施精妙的抢劫。他们也曾闯入工会那些被法术保护的办公室，偷窃其行政文件。最近一次，他们闯入了斯蒂芬尼克·德拉科根的办公室，就位于贾斯汀·维耶坠落的架空步道附近。他们并没有偷走保险箱里的金块，却取走了里面的商业文件。从未有人发现他们的踪迹，他们也从不留下任何证据——因此得名“织雾魅影”。

original: There is a thief who calls themselves the "Mistweaving Phantom". They've been expertly robbing several merchant ships that were resting at Aurinax Harbor. They've also been breaking into the magically secured offices of the workers' unions and stealing administrative documents. They also broke into Stefanic Dracogen's office near the catwalk where Justin Waye fell from. They didn't steal the gold inside the safe, but they took the business documents inside. Lastly, they've also targeted individuals who have been plotting against the king. No one ever spots them, and they never leave any evidence behind—hence the name.
translation: 有一个自称为“织雾魅影”的盗窃团伙。他们一直在对停靠在欧奥耐克斯港的货船实施精妙的抢劫。他们也曾闯入工会那些被法术保护的办公室，偷窃其行政文件。他们还闯入了斯蒂芬尼克·德拉科根的办公室，就位于贾斯汀·维耶坠落的架空步道附近。他们并没有偷走保险箱里的金块，却取走了里面的商业文件。最后，他们还将那些密谋反对国王的人作为目标。从未有人发现他们的踪迹，他们也从不留下任何证据——因此得名“织雾魅影”。

translation: 据称欧奥耐克斯的公会与斯蒂芬尼克·德拉科根之间发生了冲突。然而，这一说法遭到了精炼厂工会的负责人，即诺亚·莫里森（欧奥耐克斯港的港务长，也是我们家多年以来的密友）的否定。

original: Justin was holding this leather strap before he fell into the vat of magical chemicals. It has "VI" engraved at the end of it. It's covered in traces of conjuration magic.
translation: 贾斯汀在落入魔力精炼容器前握着这根皮带。其末端刻有“VI”的字样。皮带表面覆盖着召唤术的痕迹。

  "description": "Mosourika Tudor was delivering Justin's breakfast to him, but she couldn't find him in the freight area. She went looking for him and spotted him on the catwalk within the refinery. {
  "reference name": "RikaTest2",
  "display name": "Witness Testimony",
  "description": "Mosourika Tudor was delivering Justin's breakfast to him, but she couldn't find him in the freight area. She went looking for him and spotted him on the catwalk within the refinery. Aster de Wyverngarde was also there at the time and saw Justin yelling at a hairless animal. \n\nThey both saw Justin get blasted with some sort of spell that took the shape of an expanding prism. This spell destroyed the guardrail of the catwalk and pushed Justin into the vat.",

original:
Mosourika Tudor was delivering Justin's breakfast to him, but she couldn't find him in the freight area. She went looking for him and spotted him on the catwalk within the refinery. Aster de Wyverngarde was also there at the time and saw Justin yelling at a hairless animal. 

They both saw Justin get blasted with some sort of spell that took the shape of an expanding prism. This spell destroyed the guardrail of the catwalk and pushed Justin into the vat.
